Kornasia chevalieri, a flowering plant of the borage family, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in soothing digestive issues and boosting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Kornasia chevalieri include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Kornasia chevalieri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
